/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_support.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/metrics/executor_metrics_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/metrics/executor_metrics_channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/priority_task_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/priority_task_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/task_execution_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/task_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/task_worker_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/unique_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/execution_context_description.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/executors/executor_decoration_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/network/io_broker_epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/network/io_broker_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/network/io_timer_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/network/sockets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/network/transport_layer_address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/synchronization/futex_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/tracing/resource_usage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/tracing/event_tracing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/backtrace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/bit_encoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/byte_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/byte_buffer_chain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/cpu_architecture_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/resource_usage/powercap_energy_reader_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/resource_usage/rapl_msr_energy_reader_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/resource_usage/power_consumption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/resource_usage/resource_usage_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/rate_limiting/token_bucket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/signal_handling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/sysinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_support.dir/timers.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_support.a
